title: Ensemble declarative test file
description: Schema for app-local tests/*.test.yaml — one test per file; see tools/ensemble_test_runner/STEP_VOCABULARY.md

feature.description: Feature or flow name, e.g. login or wifi

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and organization

parallel.description: Set false for tests that mutate shared external state and must not run in a parallel worker shard.

retry.description: Number of additional attempts after the first failure.

startScreen.description: Ensemble screen name or id to load first

session.description: ID of a successful test whose captured app state is restored before startScreen

setup.description: Headless httpRequest actions executed before startScreen mounts

$merge.description: Path → value patches applied onto the extended/current mock for this API (e.g. body.status[0].Active).

$extends.description: Base mock file path (or list of paths) to layer before these APIs.

args_openScreen.title: openScreen
args_openScreen.description: Navigate to another screen by name or id mid-test

args_reloadScreen.title: reloadScreen
args_reloadScreen.description: Reload the current screen (same as re-opening it)

args_restartApp.title: restartApp
args_restartApp.description: Reset runtime and reopen the test case start screen

args_resetAppState.title: resetAppState
args_resetAppState.description: Clear screen tracker, API call log, and public storage

args_trigger.title: trigger
args_trigger.description: Fire a widget action (onLoad, onTap, onLongPress) by testId

args_launchApp.title: launchApp
args_launchApp.description: Alias for restartApp — bootstrap from startScreen again

timeoutMs.description: Poll until the widget is hit-testable before tapping (default: defaultWaitTimeout)

args_enterText.title: enterText
args_enterText.description: Type text into an input field by testId

args_clearText.title: clearText
args_clearText.description: Clear text in an input field by testId

args_replaceText.title: replaceText
args_replaceText.description: Replace the full contents of an input field

args_focus.title: focus
args_focus.description: Focus an input field by testId

args_unfocus.title: unfocus
args_unfocus.description: Remove focus from the current field

args_select.title: select
args_select.description: Open a dropdown and choose an option by visible label

args_selectIndex.title: selectIndex
args_selectIndex.description: Open a dropdown and choose the option at index

args_check.title: check
args_check.description: Check a checkbox or toggle by testId

args_uncheck.title: uncheck
args_uncheck.description: Uncheck a checkbox by testId if currently checked

args_toggle.title: toggle
args_toggle.description: Tap to toggle a switch or checkbox by testId

args_setSlider.title: setSlider
args_setSlider.description: Move a slider under testId to a normalized value (0–1)

args_chooseDate.title: chooseDate
args_chooseDate.description: Set a date field by testId to the given value string

args_chooseTime.title: chooseTime
args_chooseTime.description: Set a time field by testId to the given value string

args_scroll.title: scroll
args_scroll.description: Drag the first Scrollable by delta pixels

args_scrollUntilVisible.title: scrollUntilVisible
args_scrollUntilVisible.description: Scroll until a widget with testId is visible

args_swipe.title: swipe
args_swipe.description: Swipe on a scrollable or widget (direction: left/right/up/down)

args_drag.title: drag
args_drag.description: Drag a widget by testId by dx/dy offset

args_pullToRefresh.title: pullToRefresh
args_pullToRefresh.description: Pull down on a scrollable to trigger refresh

args_wait.title: wait
args_wait.description: Real-time delay using runAsync, followed by a frame pump

args_pump.title: pump
args_pump.description: Advance the Flutter frame clock by durationMs

args_settle.title: settle
args_settle.description: Run pumpAndSettle until idle or timeout

args_waitFor.title: waitFor
args_waitFor.description: Poll until a widget id and/or text appears

args_waitForText.title: waitForText
args_waitForText.description: Poll until the given text appears on screen

args_waitForGone.title: waitForGone
args_waitForGone.description: Poll until a widget with testId is removed from the tree

args_waitForApi.title: waitForApi
args_waitForApi.description: Poll until a mocked API is called N times

args_httpRequest.title: httpRequest
args_httpRequest.description: Send an HTTP request to a test support service

args_mocks.title: mocks
args_mocks.description: Replace active API mocks for subsequent steps

args_waitForNavigation.title: waitForNavigation
args_waitForNavigation.description: Poll until the given screen is visible

args_expectVisible.title: expectVisible
args_expectVisible.description: Assert a widget with testId is visible

args_expectNotVisible.title: expectNotVisible
args_expectNotVisible.description: Assert a widget with testId is not visible

args_expectExists.title: expectExists
args_expectExists.description: Assert a widget with testId exists in the tree

args_expectNotExists.title: expectNotExists
args_expectNotExists.description: Assert no widget with testId exists

args_expectText.title: expectText
args_expectText.description: Assert exact text is shown (or anyOf list)

args_expectNoText.title: expectNoText
args_expectNoText.description: Assert text is not shown (or none of anyOf)

timeoutMs.description: When set, poll until matching text is visible (default: instant assert)

args_expectTextContains.title: expectTextContains
args_expectTextContains.description: Assert some text containing the given substring (or anyOf list)

args_expectChecked.title: expectChecked
args_expectChecked.description: Assert checkbox checked state matches equals

args_expectProperty.title: expectProperty
args_expectProperty.description: Assert a widget property (e.g. label) equals expected

args_expectCount.title: expectCount
args_expectCount.description: Assert count of widgets with the same testId

args_expectListCount.title: expectListCount
args_expectListCount.description: Assert number of list items under a list testId

args_expectListItem.title: expectListItem
args_expectListItem.description: Assert a list item widget with itemId is visible

args_expectEmpty.title: expectEmpty
args_expectEmpty.description: Assert a list has zero items

args_expectNotEmpty.title: expectNotEmpty
args_expectNotEmpty.description: Assert a list has at least one item

args_expectScreen.title: expectScreen
args_expectScreen.description: Alias for expectNavigateTo — assert current screen

args_expectNavigateTo.title: expectNavigateTo
args_expectNavigateTo.description: Assert the current visible screen name/id

args_expectVisited.title: expectVisited
args_expectVisited.description: Assert a screen appears in navigation history

args_expectNotVisited.title: expectNotVisited
args_expectNotVisited.description: Assert a screen was never visited

args_expectBackStack.title: expectBackStack
args_expectBackStack.description: Assert navigation history suffix matches screens

args_expectCanGoBack.title: expectCanGoBack
args_expectCanGoBack.description: Assert whether back navigation is possible

args_expectApiCalled.title: expectApiCalled
args_expectApiCalled.description: Assert an API was called an exact number of times

args_expectApiNotCalled.title: expectApiNotCalled
args_expectApiNotCalled.description: Assert an API was never called

args_expectApiCallOrder.title: expectApiCallOrder
args_expectApiCallOrder.description: Assert APIs were called in order

args_expectLastApiCall.title: expectLastApiCall
args_expectLastApiCall.description: Assert the most recent API call name

args_setStorage.title: setStorage
args_setStorage.description: Write a value to public GetStorage by key

args_expectStorage.title: expectStorage
args_expectStorage.description: Assert public storage key equals expected

args_removeStorage.title: removeStorage
args_removeStorage.description: Remove a key from public storage

args_clearStorage.title: clearStorage
args_clearStorage.description: Clear all non-encrypted public storage keys

args_setEnv.title: setEnv
args_setEnv.description: Override an environment variable for the test

args_setPermission.title: setPermission
args_setPermission.description: Set a permission flag for the test runtime

args_setTheme.title: setTheme
args_setTheme.description: Set Ensemble theme via EnsembleThemeManager (e.g. light/dark)

args_runScript.title: runScript
args_runScript.description: Evaluate a script expression in the data context

args_expectScriptResult.title: expectScriptResult
args_expectScriptResult.description: Evaluate script and assert result equals expected

args_expectConsoleLog.title: expectConsoleLog
args_expectConsoleLog.description: Assert a console log line contains text

args_group.title: group
args_group.description: Run nested steps as a named group

args_ifVisible.title: ifVisible
args_ifVisible.description: Run nested steps only if testId is visible

args_logApiCalls.title: logApiCalls
args_logApiCalls.description: Log all recorded API calls to the test log

args_expectNoConsoleErrors.title: expectNoConsoleErrors
args_expectNoConsoleErrors.description: Assert no console errors were recorded

args_expectNoRenderErrors.title: expectNoRenderErrors
args_expectNoRenderErrors.description: Assert no Flutter render errors were recorded

args_expectError.title: expectError
args_expectError.description: Assert a Flutter error was recorded (optional filter)

args_expectAccessible.title: expectAccessible
args_expectAccessible.description: Assert widget has accessibility label or value

args_expectNoOverflow.title: expectNoOverflow
args_expectNoOverflow.description: Assert widget renders without overflow issues
